name: Zlata Pavlovskaia
roles: Communications / PR at galleries, museums, Kunstvereine
Social media management for cultural orgs

languages.scoring_note: German C1+ required roles should score low unless the listing suggests flexibility. English-friendly or international workplaces get a strong boost. Russian can be an asset for orgs working with Eastern European art/communities.

experience_summary: Independent curator and researcher with an Erasmus Mundus MA in Media Art Cultures (Aalborg University) and an MA in Curatorial Studies (SPbU/Bard College). Specializes in sound art, media art, and experimental publishing. Has curated 12+ exhibitions and projects across Denmark, Poland, and Russia. Professional experience spans curatorial work (Sound Art Lab, Struer Tracks Biennial), gallery management (NameGallery), art mediation (Hermitage, Russian Museum of Ethnography), social media/comms management, and editorial/publishing projects. Strong in project coordination, public programming, and artist communication.
strengths: Sound art and media art specialization
Art mediation — museum and gallery contexts
dealbreakers: Requires fluent German (C1+) with no flexibility mentioned
Requires technical skills she doesn't have (e.g. web development, accounting)
nice_to_have: Sound art, media art, or contemporary art focus
Language courses or German learning support provided
